Two Handed Practice Sword  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 47
DMG: 19 Dmg Bonus: 160
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Shield of Thistles (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 22
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

this sword rock people i am a 23 pally and with this sword and my BABS i can solo forest giant

Just a question
QuoteReply
# Nov 29 2001 at 5:27 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592756600730
103 posts
Don't you think that a practice two hander would have like a 10 delay with a .5 dmg? that way, you'll swing alot more and there for raise your 2hs faster, aka practicing your 2hs.. -shrugs- just a question...
▲ Page top
RE: Just a question
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2002 at 3:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251819268
29 posts
From a RP perspective, though, you practice using a large sword by swinging a heaveier version, so that you develop the muscles to handle one of a normal weight more effectively.
▲ Page top

# Nov 02 2001 at 10:53 AM Rating: Default

QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2001 at 3:40 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594570526995
103 posts
I dont know about you but I am a lvl 40 Paladin and I like to use this sword once in a great while and I can nail a mob for around an average of 67 damage per hit and sometimes double that with a double connect. Once in a great while I can pull of an 80 damage or so. I like the sword but now I need something that does well into the 100s for damage.
Take care and Happy hunting

Aamadanae Whirlwind
40th Paladin
Officer of The Knights of Burning Justice
Proud member of The Phoenix Legion

# Jul 10 2001 at 6:14 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591759149507
150 posts
Dude, EQ isn't bout twinking (

I'm 23 and trying to (TRYING is the key word) for some more Fine Plate/Ry'Gorr armor, but bought this from a friend for 100pp. I don't use 2HS that much only to max it out for my lvl's (so I can use my epics) and stick to my Ghoulbane, which I quested for (pretty easy, took me bout 3 hours to do, walk in ask for the loot and walk out, which is better than spending 600-1000pp for)

So, this is a nice sword, i like it just wish it was a teeny bit faster though

# Jan 16 2001 at 7:13 PM Rating: Default

View User Forum

▲ Page top
RE: What Level?
QuoteReply
# Mar 01 2001 at 3:08 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592756968804
Scholar
28 posts
You can use this weapon at any level and it works well on any magic MOB. The Shield started to proc at 22 for my Level 22 Pally for 6 dmg points. Great weapon - just slow.

▲ Page top
RE: What Level?
QuoteReply
# Mar 01 2001 at 2:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245702628
Scholar
72 posts
You need to be level 22 to use the damage shield.

It is a damage shield for 6. Rangers get it at 30, and Druids get it at 22 (I think)
▲ Page top
